title: Terres d'Argentan Interco
summary: Terres d'Argentan Interco (before 2023: Communauté de communes d'Argentan Intercom) is a federation of municipalities (communauté de communes) in the Orne département and in the Normandy région of France. Its seat is Argentan. Its area is 715.1 km2, and its population in 2019 was 33,409. It covers some of the Communes that make up the area known as Suisse Normande.
text:
Terres d'Argentan Interco (before 2023: Communauté de communes d'Argentan Intercom) is a federation of municipalities (communauté de communes) in the Orne département and in the Normandy région of France. Its seat is Argentan. Its area is 715.1 km2, and its population in 2019 was 33,409. It covers some of the Communes that make up the area known as Suisse Normande.

Composition
The communauté de communes consists of the following 49 communes:
